failedAssertions.reason: Runtime returns stub responses 'Task completed successfully (stub provider)' rather than routing through gateway to Bedrock/Z.AI. The proxy → runtime → UI path is functional, but gateway → provider integration is not yet connected.
failedAssertions.evidence: Task submission works, status/events flow correctly, but runtime does not invoke gateway for provider calls. Gateway service is healthy on Node B (provider: zai).

failedAssertions.reason: Cannot test guest workload isolation - Firecracker VMs not yet active on Node B. Currently operating in host-process mode.
failedAssertions.evidence: vmctl shows active_vms: 0. Guest images exist at /var/lib/go-choir/guest/ but Firecracker integration is pending.

failedAssertions.reason: Cannot verify provider secret absence from guest VM - Firecracker VMs not yet running.
failedAssertions.evidence: Guest image build (nix/guest-image.nix) excludes credentials, but runtime verification requires active VMs.

testEnvironment.providerCredentials: Configured at /var/lib/go-choir/gateway-provider.env (host-only, not in Nix store)
